channel.title: Process Control on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in Process Control on Qianqian Shan

item.title: Notes on Statistical Quality Control
item.description: Notes on Introduction to Statistical Quality Control by Montgomery Qianqian Shan Contents 1 Quality Improvement in The Modern Business Environment  1.1 The Meaning of Quality and Quality Improvement  1.2 Statistical Methods for Quality Control and Improvement 2 The DMAIC Process 3 Methods and Philosophy of Statistical Process Control  3.1 Statistical Basis of the Control Chart  3.2 Choice of Control Limits  3.3 Choice of Sample Size and Sampling Frequency  3.
